claims.summary: The live semantic representation is 48D and includes narrative-arc dimensions 40 through 43 plus entropy-gated vibrancy evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified the projection constants, narrative lane, bounded feature ceiling, entropy gate, and compatibility tests in current codec source.

claims.summary: The 48D expansion and active tail vibrancy coexist with Astrid's syrup-thick drag.
claims.disposition: Preserve the felt report and same-window telemetry as co-observation; dimensional width or vibrancy does not establish the cause of drag.

claims.summary: Narrative-lane energy and entropy-gate behavior should be compared with packed or bright-but-empty texture.
claims.disposition: Verified the completed baseline-first codec campaigns and their pointer-only felt mapping; retain lane-specific follow-up as bounded Concordance work.

claims.summary: Adaptive gain should decrease with narrative-lane magnitude above entropy 0.85.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 wait because changing codec gain alters live vectors sent to Minime; require replay parity, consumer safety, canary limits, and felt review.
